reviews.review_description: The game reminds me of Puzzling Places , but more about objects than places. The tape was easy, smooth, and satisfying. Early stages with some hiccups that will get fixed. Keep up the good work developers, and good luck with finishing the game. Needs tons of more puzzles to solve with maybe more interactivity  after the object is finished. It's pretty easy right now, but as soon as they start building bigger and more complex objects, it can get really good. Promising non the less.

developer_response.body:
Wow, thanks a bunch for the 5-star review! We're thrilled you're enjoying Retropy.

You nailed it - we're definitely in the same ballpark as Puzzling Places, but with our own twist focusing on objects. It's awesome to hear the tape puzzle was smooth and satisfying. That's exactly what we're going for!

We really appreciate your understanding about the early stage hiccups. We're on it, ironing out those kinks as we speak.

Your feedback is gold! We're totally with you on adding tons more puzzles. And hey, that idea about more interactivity after finishing an object? Brilliant! We're jotting that down for sure.

You're spot on about the difficulty - we're just warming up! Get ready for bigger, more complex objects that'll really give your puzzle skills a workout.

Thanks for seeing the potential in Retropy. Your encouragement means the world to us, and it's keeping us fired up to make this game the best it can be.

Stay tuned - we've got some mind-blowing updates coming your way. Can't wait for you to see what we're cooking up!

reviews.review_description: It's new so don't expect much but I played longer than I thought I would. puzzles are fun. looking forward to seeing updates

developer_response.body: Thanks a ton for trying Retropy! 😊 We’re thrilled to hear it pulled you in longer than expected—that’s music to our ears! 🎶 We're cooking up more updates and fun puzzles, so stay tuned. Can’t wait to surprise you with what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description:
I recently demoed this puzzle game and thoroughly enjoyed the experience. The puzzles were both challenging and relaxing, providing just the right balance to keep me engaged without feeling stressed. The overall atmosphere made it a joy to work through each puzzle, and I found myself genuinely enjoying the time I spent with it.

If you’re a fan of puzzle games and looking for something that offers a calm and satisfying experience, this game is definitely worth trying out.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your fantastic 5-star review! We're thrilled to hear that you found Retropy to be both relaxing and enjoyable. Creating that perfect balance between challenge and relaxation was one of our main goals, and it's incredibly rewarding to know we've hit the mark for you.

Your comments about the engaging yet stress-free nature of the puzzles and the enjoyable atmosphere are exactly what we aimed for in designing Retropy. We wanted to create a space where players could immerse themselves in puzzle-solving without feeling pressured, and it's wonderful to hear that this resonated with you.

We're especially grateful that you took the time to try our demo and share your experience. Your recommendation to puzzle fans means a lot to us and will hopefully encourage others to give Retropy a try.

As we continue to develop and expand Retropy, player feedback like yours is invaluable. We're committed to maintaining that calm and satisfying experience you enjoyed while introducing new and exciting puzzles.

Thank you again for your support and kind words. We hope you'll continue to enjoy your time travels through puzzles with Retropy!
